description: You are an architectural historian preparing for a lecture. Curate a collection of three distinct high-resolution images (minimum 2500 pixels wide) of 'Gothic architecture details' from Wikimedia Commons (commons.wikimedia.org). Save the images as asset_01, asset_02, and asset_03 (jpg or png) in the folder /home/ga/Documents/LectureAssets. Additionally, create a text file at /home/ga/Documents/LectureAssets/credits.txt containing the direct source URLs for the three images.
